name: template-plugin
description: Teaching marketplace: minimal Claude Code plugins bundling Python MCP servers

plugins.name: csv-demo
plugins.description: MCP tool to describe CSV files with case_id and usd_amount columns

plugins.name: txt-demo
plugins.description: MCP tool to describe text files — demonstrates sharing code from the marketplace root via a symlink

plugins.name: txt-skill-demo
plugins.description: Skill that describes text files via a bundled script — the skill-based counterpart of txt-demo's MCP tool
